name: minimarket-innova
description: Aplicación para gestión de Minimarket Innova

scripts.dev:all: concurrently "cross-env PORT=3001 node server.js" "cross-env PORT=3002 react-scripts start"
scripts.cap:init: npx cap init MiniMarketInnova com.minimarket.innova --web-dir build
scripts.cap:build: npm run build:prod && npx cap sync android
scripts.seed:clean-demo: cross-env NODE_ENV=development node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const mongoose = require('mongoose'); mongoose.connect(process.env.MONGO_URI || 'mongodb://127.0.0.1:27017/minimarket').then(() => { const User = mongoose.model('Usuario', new mongoose.Schema({})); User.deleteMany({ email: { \$in: ['jefe@demo.local', 'empleado1@demo.local', 'empleado2@demo.local'] } }).then(() => { console.log('✅ Demo users cleaned'); process.exit(0); }); }).catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); });"
